items.title: Ireland's Grehan 'buzzing' after earning major spots with dramatic Amateur win
items.summary: Ireland's Stuart Grehan secured his spot in three of the next four majors after claiming a dramatic victory over Matt Moloney to win The Amateur Championship at Royal Liverpool.

items.summary: MANCHESTER UNITED fans have urged Michael Carrick to do whatever it takes to sign Crysencio Summerville after the West Ham winger continued his red-hot World Cup form for the Netherlands. items.title: Almeraq bounces back to win Royal Ascot sprint spectacular
items.summary: Almeraq got the better of a blanket finish in winning the battle of the international speedsters for Tom Marquand and William Haggas in the Queen Elizabeth II Jubilee Stakes at Royal Ascot.

items.title: Milestone man Root gives England 'smidgeon' with NZ '99 per cent' likely to win
items.summary: Joe Root passed 14,000 Test runs on Saturday and reached stumps at The Oval 25 runs away from a 42nd century in the format, but he will have another number on his mind - 281.

items.title: World Cup ball controversy as pundits spot MULTIPLE times Adidas Trionda ‘not behaving as you would expect it to’
items.summary: WORLD CUP goalkeeper pundits have taken issue with Adidas' unpredictable Trionda ball. Former England internationals Paul Robinson and Joe Hart have both picked out multiple occasions of stoppers being caught out by long-range strikes they may, under normal circumstances, have been expected to save.

items.title: Newcastle reject £80m Spurs bid for Tonali
items.summary: Newcastle have rejected an offer from Tottenham of around £80m for Sandro Tonali.

items.title: Lift-off for Netherlands with thumping win over Sweden
items.summary: Netherlands took a huge step towards the World Cup knockout stages with a commanding 5-1 victory over Sweden in Group F, inspired by brilliant doubles from Brian Brobbey and Cody Gakpo.

items.title: Cooling hoodies help England staff combat World Cup heat
items.summary: As the England players trained under the searing heat of the Kansas City sun on Saturday, manager Thomas Tuchel took a very different approach to keeping himself cool.

items.title: Gakpo fires home the 100th goal of this World Cup
items.summary: Cody Gakpo scores the 100th goal of this World Cup as he his second of the game to put Netherlands 4-0 ahead against Sweden.
